title: Kuma’s Promise to Bonney
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Bonney, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kuma, Vegapunk as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You will someday...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...Save the world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Install a self- district Mecha- Nism?!!

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Are you really that terrified of Kuma?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't complain. Isn't his terrifying status as a human- weapon your doing?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you five already have the highest priority in the command hierarchy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and if he were to somehow go rogue when not in our presence?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: How would anyone else stop him?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: do not answer. I'm not interested in the opinions of a scientist for hire.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Then, in exchange for me doing that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Let me keep just a touch of his ego intact!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've invented a circuit for the brain that allows one to switch between two states of consciousness. Akin to a split personality!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: If you allow me to test it--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I've given the order...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Vega- punk!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: erase his individuality completely, make sure no trace of him remains!! You won't be forgiven if you don't.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Remember, I too, am a man of science. Any attempts to deceive me will fail.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But if we do that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuma won't get to reunite with Bonney at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: It's good to know how you feel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: VEGAPUNK.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What!!! I didn't think you'd be able to over- hear...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Alright then!! Today is the day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...We erase your sense of individual- ality.

dialogue.speaker: Bonney
dialogue.text: Kuma... It's only been two years,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But it was fun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Heheh... I suppose it was.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's looking like your first assignment will be a battle with the Whitebeard Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been asked to prepare a Battalion of your clone soldiers for that too.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Once that's over and done with...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...there's something I'd like you to program me to do.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Protect the ship of the straw hat pirates!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Just until one of them returns.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd like to be a stubborn guardian for their home...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...Since I WOW'T BE ABLE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: ...to witness their continued growth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What kind of future are you dreaming up for that boy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: His actions have really moved me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know Nika is meant to be a legend, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be great if there really was a warrior out there, putting smiles on faces, using the rhythm of liberation... the rhythm I taught Bonney.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if there is a hero out there that will change these seas one day...

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 41 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
